name: Cadence Bank
description_short: Cadence Bank is a full-service bank offering personal, wealth, and commercial banking services with multiple branch locations in Florida, including the Sarasota branch.
description_long:
Cadence Bank operates as a traditional full-service financial institution with physical branch locations across Florida. The Sarasota branch, located at 25 S Links Ave, provides comprehensive banking services to both personal and business customers in the region. The bank is FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government, offering deposit protection and stability for customer funds.

The bank offers a wide range of personal banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit, debit cards, personal loans and lines of credit, mortgages, home equity lines of credit, and personal credit cards. For wealth management clients, Cadence provides financial planning services, investment management, private banking, trust services, and comprehensive wealth management for individuals and families. The commercial and business division offers business credit cards, commercial and industrial banking, commercial real estate banking, equipment financing, small business banking, treasury management services, and foreign currency exchange.

The Sarasota branch distinguishes itself through extended LIVE Teller hours (1:00 PM-1:00 AM weekdays, 2:00 PM-6:00 PM Saturday), 24/7 ATM access, and multiple service delivery channels including drive-thru and online banking options. The branch appears to offer personalized service with appointment scheduling and maintains traditional lobby hours Monday-Friday 9:00 AM-5:00 PM. The company emphasizes security and fraud protection through its Fraud and Security Center, and offers multiple account login options for different customer segments.

As a traditional bank, Cadence serves customers seeking comprehensive financial services in one institution. However, the website provided is location-specific and does not detail competitive interest rates, fee structures, minimum account balances, or specific lending terms. Customers should contact the branch directly to confirm service availability and obtain pricing information, as the disclaimer notes that not all locations have representatives for all services.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government guarantee
Extended LIVE Teller hours until 1:00 AM weekdays and Saturday afternoon service
24/7 ATM access for round-the-clock cash withdrawals
Multiple service channels: branch lobby, drive-thru, LIVE Teller, online, and mobile banking
Comprehensive product suite across personal, wealth management, and business banking
Online appointment scheduling available for personalized service
Multiple nearby branch locations in the Sarasota area for customer convenience
cons: Website does not disclose interest rates, account fees, or minimum balance requirements
Standard lobby hours (9 AM-5 PM weekdays) limit in-person service access for working customers
Not all services available at every location; customers must contact branch to confirm
As a traditional bank, likely higher fees and lower interest rates compared to online-only alternatives
No information provided about investment minimums or wealth management service thresholds
best_for: Customers seeking comprehensive banking services including personal, business, and wealth management in one institution
Sarasota-area residents and businesses needing extended-hours LIVE Teller access and local branch support
Customers who prefer traditional banking with in-person service, drive-thru, and digital options
Small business owners needing commercial banking, equipment financing, and treasury management services
diagnosis: Cadence Bank's Sarasota branch is best for customers seeking full-service banking with extended LIVE Teller hours and multiple local branches in the Sarasota area. The main caveat is that specific product terms, interest rates, and fees are not disclosed on the location page—customers must contact the branch directly to compare offerings and confirm all services are available at their preferred location.
services: Personal loans and lines of credit
Wealth management for individuals and families
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
